import pytest
from myapp.orders import Order
from myapp.validation import validate_email, validate_age, validate_discount

def test_order_total_calculation():
    items = [
        {"price": 10.0, "qty": 2},
        {"price": 5.0, "qty": 3},
    ]
    order = Order(items=items)
    assert order.total == 35.0

def test_discount_validation():
    assert validate_discount(15) is True
    assert validate_discount(-5) is False
    assert validate_discount(105) is False

def test_email_format_check():
    assert validate_email("user@example.com") is True
    assert validate_email("invalid") is False

def test_age_boundary():
    assert validate_age(25) is True
    assert validate_age(17) is False
    assert validate_age(121) is False
